name: Trae
description: China's first AI-native IDE by ByteDance, launched February 24, 2026. Features full-scenario AI-native development environment, seamless VS Code migration, full-process automated development, optimized for Chinese language context with enterprise-level flexible deployment.

name: Straion
description: Enterprise-focused AI coding agent solving the 'babysitting problem' by providing organizational context and rules automatically, ensuring agents work within enterprise constraints. Founded by ex-Elastic, Dynatrace, Netlify team. Reached #2 on Product Hunt with 349 upvotes.
community_quotes: Solves the enterprise AI agent 'babysitting problem'
Austrian-based team from Elastic, Dynatrace, Netlify

name: Base44 Backend Platform
description: Complete backend service platform for AI agent applications with full-stack deployment, no configuration required, optimized for Claude Code and Cursor. Launched February 16, 2026 with 462 upvotes on Product Hunt.
community_quotes: Optimized for Claude Code and Cursor

name: Cline CLI
description: Command-line tool for automated coding with parallel agents support. Featured on Product Hunt February 2026 with 255 upvotes. Offers CI/CD integration, ACP support, multi-editor compatibility, and headless mode.
